untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit pattern recognition (flag consolidation formation, trend duration 32-47 days, price relationship measures). Available indicators cannot identify multi-bar flag patterns, measure pre-pattern trend duration, or calculate flag measure rules (price rise approximately half the rise leading to pattern). Breakout volume confirmation also requires pattern context not available in indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated falling volume trend characteristic using volume comparisons and vol_ratio_20 < 1.0. Used Donchian channels as proxy for breakout detection. Hold_days_max set to 41 days (upper bound of post-breakout trend duration). Stop loss set conservatively at 5% due to author silence on stop placement. Direction kept CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal definition. Success rates (64% bull, 42% average rise) noted but not quantifiable in rule conditions.
